# Variant Configuration (.vcf) - AI Prompting Guide

⚠️ CRITICAL STRING QUOTING RULE: ALL property values (description, rationale, steps, verificationcriteria, safestate, expertise, context, designrationale, etc.) MUST use triple quotes """ only. Do NOT use single quotes " — it breaks the Tiptap editor.
## Purpose: Configuration values for variant (ALWAYS AUTO-GENERATED)
## When: Right-click .vml → "Generate Configuration"
## Key Syntax: hdef config, def config [feature-id] (enabled|disabled)
## Note: NEVER manually create .vcf files - always use right-click generation command
